aeo_readiness.summary: Aether Mechanical has a decent foundation for AEO readiness with some areas for improvement in content optimization, review generation, and local SEO.
quick_wins: Generate more customer reviews on Google to improve local search visibility and credibility.
Optimize meta titles and descriptions with targeted keywords for better search engine ranking.
Enhance website content with more detailed service descriptions and location-specific keywords.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has some local SEO elements in place, such as a contact page and local phone number, but lacks a consistent Google Business Profile (GBP) listing.
gbp_analysis.summary: Aether Mechanical's local SEO could be significantly improved by creating and optimizing a GBP listing, which is crucial for local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of local business citations and NAP consistency across the web.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or limited NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across the web, which affects local search rankings.
action_items: Create and verify a GBP listing with accurate NAP information.
Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Submit the business to reputable local directories and citation sites.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of comprehensive local SEO strategy and GBP optimization.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Aurora, Colorado, and nearby areas.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a GBP listing and generating customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by creating location-specific content and engaging with the community through local events and partnerships.

page_title: HVAC Service Denver | HVAC Repair & Installation Experts
